CreateVpnTunnel.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](https://cloud.baidu.com/doc/VPC/s/gjwvyu77i/).
CreateVpnTunnel.vpnId: The ID of the VPN gateway
CreateVpnTunnel.secretKey: Shared secret key, 8–17 characters, must contain letters, digits, and symbols simultaneously; allowed symbols: !@#$%^*()_
CreateVpnTunnel.localSubnets: List of local network CIDR blocks
CreateVpnTunnel.remoteSubnets: List of remote network CIDR blocks
CreateVpnTunnel.vpnConnName: VPN tunnel name; alphanumeric characters and special characters -_/. are allowed, must start with a letter, length 1–65
CreateVpnTunnel.ikeConfig.ikeLifeTime: SA lifetime in seconds; valid range: 60–86400
CreateVpnTunnel.ipsecConfig.ipsecLifetime: SA lifetime in seconds; valid range: 180–86400
